title: 渐进式披露三层机制
brief: 技术插图，展示 Hermes Skill System 的渐进式披露架构：Level 0 (skills_list) 只返回元数据，Level 1 (skill_view) 返回完整技能内容，Level 2 按需加载参考文件。模块化设计，清晰的层次结构，数据流箭头，中英文双语标签。
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled '渐进式披露三层机制'. Diagram type: body inset illustration. Use a soft technical diagram, subtle dashed containers, layered modules, light academic visual language. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
技术插图，展示 Hermes Skill System 的渐进式披露架构：Level 0 (skills_list) 只返回元数据，Level 1 (skill_view) 返回完整技能内容，Level 2 按需加载参考文件。模块化设计，清晰的层次结构，数据流箭头，中英文双语标签。
